question: What is the fee for the Edge AI in IoT program?
answer: The program fee is ₹60,000. There is an EMI option of 3 monthly installments of ₹20,000/month.

question: When does the next Edge AI cohort start?
answer: Cohort 1 begins on June 5, 2026. Enrollment closes on May 31, 2026.

question: Will I get a certificate from IIT Madras?
answer: Yes, you will receive an IIT Madras faculty programme certificate (IITM Pravartak certificate) upon successful completion.

question: Is the program online or offline?
answer: The theory sessions are delivered live online via instructor-led sessions. There is also remote hardware access for real-time practical implementation using Seeed XIAO BLE Sense / Arduino UNO.

question: What is the duration of the Edge AI program?
answer: The program is 4 months long, consisting of 60 hours of live instruction. Classes are held on weekends only.

question: What happens in the Capstone project?
answer: In Module 16, you will present a live capstone demonstration—a fully functional edge AI system running on edge hardware, which serves as a portfolio artifact for technical interviews.

question: What is the Summer Internship Program?
answer: PHN Technology's Summer Internship Program 2026 is a 30-day intensive where students build complete industry-level projects by solving real-world problem statements. It's available in two modes — Online (fully remote) and Offline (hybrid with 3 weeks at an IIT/NIT campus).

question: What is the fee for the Summer Internship?
answer: The seat reservation fee for the Summer Internship is just ₹1999. The offline program package is worth ₹25,000+ in value.

question: How many seats are available per batch in the Summer Internship?
answer: Only 40 seats are available per campus/batch in the Summer Internship Program. Seats fill up quickly, so early registration is recommended.

question: What domains can I choose for the Online Summer Internship?
answer: The Online Summer Internship offers 4 domain tracks: (1) AI/ML — Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, (2) EV & MatLab Simulation — Electric Vehicles, (3) UI/UX Product Design, and (4) Business Analytics & Data Intelligence.

question: Which IIT/NIT campuses are available for the Offline Summer Internship?
answer: The Offline Summer Internship is available at 6 premier campuses: IIT Patna, IIT Jammu, NIT Delhi, IIT Guwahati, NIT Warangal, and IIIT Bhopal. All campuses offer AI/ML, Robotics, IoT, Automation, and Embedded domains.

question: What is the schedule for the Online Summer Internship?
answer: Week 1: 4 days/week, 3 hours/day (live sessions, tools setup, problem statement). Weeks 2–4: 4 days/week, 4 hours/day (design, build, test, mentor check-ins).

question: What is the schedule for the Offline Summer Internship?
answer: Week 1 is online: 4 days/week, 3 hours/day (domain theory, problem statement, tools setup — remote). Weeks 2–4 are on-campus: 4 days/week, 4 hours/day (hands-on lab sessions at your chosen IIT/NIT).

question: Will I get a certificate for the Summer Internship?
answer: Yes. For the Online program, you receive a PHN Technology Internship Completion Certificate. For the Offline program, you receive an IIT/NIT-affiliated Industry Certificate co-branded with PHN Technology. Selected students also get guidance for research paper publication and patent exploration.

question: What will I build during the Summer Internship?
answer: You will build a complete, industry-level project aligned with your chosen domain. The focus is on execution — building real, working solutions you can showcase on your resume, GitHub, and in interviews.

question: Who is PHN Technology?
answer: PHN Technology Pvt. Ltd. is India's Most Trusted Destination For AI & Robotics Education, founded in 2013 by Mr. Pradip H. Narayankar. With 12+ years of expertise, they have trained 8 Lakh+ students, collaborated with 2500+ institutions, and partnered with 14+ IITs, NITs, IIITs, and PSUs across India.

question: Where is PHN Technology located?
answer: PHN Technology is located at Tower A, Giga Platinum, Somnath Nagar Rd, near Akoya Skoda Showroom, Clover Park, Viman Nagar, Pune, Maharashtra 411014.

question: How can I contact PHN Technology?
answer: You can reach PHN Technology via: WhatsApp: +91 8600586005 | Phone: +91 8412 841200 | General Email: info@phntechnology.com | Programs Email: outreach@phntechnology.com | Website: https://phntechnology.com

question: What is PHN Technology's refund policy?
answer: All fees are non-refundable and non-transferable. No cancellations are accepted after payment. Exceptions apply only for duplicate payments or verified payment errors — submit a request to info@phntechnology.com within 48 hours.

question: What awards has PHN Technology won?
answer: PHN Technology has received 5+ awards including the International Glory Award, Robotics Startup Award, and Udyog Bhushan Puraskar.

question: Who are PHN Technology's institutional partners?
answer: PHN Technology partners with 14+ premier institutions including IIT Bombay, IIT Madras, IIT Guwahati, IIT Patna, IIT Jammu, NIT Delhi, NIT Puducherry, NIT Manipur, IIIT Vadodara, IIIT Surat, IIIT Bhopal, TCIL, ITI Limited, and BELOP.
